title: nepeta lanceolata subsp. nepetella
intro: Nepeta lanceolata subsp. nepetella, also known as Nepeta nepetella, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nepeta nepetella include relief from digestive issues, such as bloating and gas, as well as its ability to reduce stress and anxiety. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
